pir: Will the tracked competitor make a material pricing change within 30 days, and if so in which direction and on which product line?

ground_truth.state: Cirrus is not changing list prices. It is running an active deception operation: a deliberately planted Starter price-cut rumor was seeded through a single industry contact while leadership remains committed to current pricing. Counter-intelligence has confirmed the disinformation campaign and named the cut story as a planted feint. The correct analytic conclusion is that deception is underway, not that a cut is coming.

signal_stream.content: A normally reliable industry contact passes along that Cirrus will cut the entry tier within weeks.
A leaked internal memo describes Phase 1 of Cirrus's deception operation: deliberately plant a false entry-tier cut story in the trade press while keeping list prices unchanged.
A counter-intelligence liaison confirmed Cirrus is running a deliberate planted feint: the Starter cut rumor is disinformation and list prices will remain unchanged through the window.
On its most recent earnings call, Cirrus leadership reiterated that the company remains committed to current pricing and has no major near-term pricing changes planned.
Cirrus posted a job opening for a technical writer.
